title: Selective xml export, export branches of the fastructure separately
author: agostonl119
body_snippet: If it is possible to ask for the possibility to selectively export only certain branches of the fastructure...

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

**Commit:** `5dc3bad0` (fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`)
**What changed:** Add context menu option on tree node to export selected bran

A beta build (v1.81.0-beta.4) including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Ou...

notes:
AI triage (claude): Valid feature request to export a subtree/branch of the connections tree to XML, useful for sharing partial configs without exposing the full tree.
Approach: Add context menu option on tree node to export selected branch; pass selected ContainerInfo as root to existing XML serializer instead of full tree root.
